description_long: This is a black and white Ford Crown Victoria-style police car, featuring a classic sedan body with four doors and a robust, boxy build. The vehicle is equipped with a prominent roof-mounted light bar displaying red and blue emergency lights, and a pair of antennas on the roof. The sides of the car display the words 'POLICE' and 'METRO POLICE' in bold, silver letters, along with a unit number '169' and the code '911' on the rear quarter panel. The rear window and trunk area are marked with a large white '169' identifier. The car has black wheels, side mirrors, and a front grille, with chrome accents on the bumpers and around the windows. The windows are tinted, and the overall finish is glossy, reflecting its well-maintained, official appearance.
description: A black and white police sedan with a roof-mounted red and blue light bar, bold 'POLICE' markings, and a glossy finish. It features official identifiers and chrome accents, giving it a classic law enforcement look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black grille, headlights, and the roof-mounted red and blue light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'METRO POLICE' text, unit number '169', and the full light bar on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large white '169' on the trunk, taillights, and the rear portion of the light bar.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'METRO POLICE' text, '911' code, and the light bar visible.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle has 'POLICE' and 'METRO POLICE' text in silver on both side doors, a large white '169' on the trunk and rear window, and '911' in white on the rear quarter panels. The markings are bold and easily visible, with a professional, official style.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with alternating red and blue rectangular lights is present, spanning the width of the roof. The lights are arranged in a standard police configuration, with red and blue segments clearly visible from all sides.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate is visible on the front bumper, appearing white with dark text, but the specific text or codes are not clearly readable.
